scripts.dev:web: WATCHPACK_POLLING=true PORT=3000 pnpm --dir apps/web run dev
scripts.dev:worker-api: cd apps/worker && PYTHONPATH=. venv/bin/python -m uvicorn src.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.test:worker: cd apps/worker && WEBHOOK_SECRET=unit-test-webhook-secret MOCK_MODE=true PYTHONPATH=. venv/bin/python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:worker && pnpm run test:fixes && pnpm run test:e2e && pnpm run test:policy && pnpm run test:send && pnpm run test:security
